creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Jochen,
Thanks for your efforts with Wordpress and the patch. Syntax wise the patch is correct.  However it's outside the scope of ports in general and ports-secteam to alert on things manually installed by the user like plugins. I believe it's the user's responsibility to monitor vulnerabilities in their additions (or perhaps there is or should be Wordpress functionality to monitor vulnerable plugins...). Historically I've been ignoring upstream reports of plugin issues because of this reason and planning on marking this as rejected if you concur.
